title: ComplianceEvalRecord
description: One record per compliance run. Designed to be embeddable inside a @wasmagent/core rollout JSONL record (alignment with RolloutMemoryStore is a Phase 1 task — keep this self-contained for Phase 0).

task_spec_hash.description: Stable hash of the TaskSpec JSON (e.g. sha256). Used to group runs of the same spec across models and time.

model.description: Identifier of the model under test (e.g. 'qwen2.5-14b-instruct').

violations.description: Initial violation list (before repair). Empty if first generation passed.

final_pass.description: True iff all hard constraints passed after repair.

trace_uri.description: Optional pointer to a fuller trace artifact (e.g. RolloutMemoryStore JSONL line).

error.description: Non-null iff the run failed infrastructurally (model error, sandbox crash, sequence-pool exhaustion). When present, final_pass MUST be false and downstream aggregators MUST exclude this record from rate calculations.

message.description: Original error message, truncated to 1000 chars.
